title: Elsota marginata
taxonomy: Elsota marginata is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae. The classification of Elsota marginata places it within the order Asterales. It belongs to the subclass Asteridae and the class Magnoliopsida. Elsota marginata is further classified into the division Magnoliophyta and the kingdom Plantae. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the Elsota marginata plant.
